title: Structured task clarification flow with Telegram deep links
description: Let running workspace agents ask multiple structured clarification questions, collect answers in the task dialog or Telegram inline keyboard, then resume the original execution with the full Q&A context.

title: Stale clarification reminder sweep
description: Add a lightweight API endpoint for scheduled reminder nudges when tasks wait too long for user clarification, capped to avoid notification spam.

title: Working-task progress pings
description: Send low-frequency Telegram progress pings for long-running task executions so the operator knows an agent is still active before timeout.

title: Task dialog deep-link support
description: Allow /tasks?task=<id> links to open a specific task dialog directly from external notifications and clear the link when the dialog closes.

title: Wire scheduled clarification and progress ping endpoints into cron
description: Add authenticated scheduled invocations for /api/tasks-clarify-nudge and /api/tasks-progress-ping so the new endpoints run automatically instead of remaining manual hooks.

title: Add focused tests for Telegram clarification callbacks
description: Cover option-click, freeform reply, edit-answer, and confirm-resume paths with route-level tests using mocked task store and Telegram edit helpers.

title: Clean Vitest include/exclude baseline for E2E and TAP suites
description: Adjust test configuration so Playwright e2e specs and Node TAP service tests are not collected by the unit-test Vitest run.
